governing_law.value: Laws of the State of New York
governing_law.exact_text: 12.2 Governing Law. This Agreement will be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of New York without giving effect to conflict of laws principles. Both parties submit to personal jurisdiction in New York and further agree that any cause of action arising under this Agreement shall be brought in a court in New York City, NY.

audit_rights.value: A party receiving payment may inspect the other party's records once every 12 months to verify reports.
audit_rights.exact_text: Once every 12 months, the party receiving payment or its designee may inspect such records to verify reports.

fields.liability_cap: amount Boxlot actually pays to theglobe
